blocks.title: E-Commerce Microservices Suite
blocks.description: Production-style Spring Boot services you can compose into a commerce platform. Each service owns its data, exposes REST APIs, and publishes domain events to Kafka.

blocks.title: What you get
items: Independent deployable services with clear bounded contexts.
Shared patterns: OpenAPI contracts, Flyway migrations, structured logging.
Event-driven integration between order, payment, and inventory flows.
Replace example GitHub URLs in src/data/prebuiltModules.js with your repos.

blocks.title: product-service
blocks.body: Catalog, categories, SKU metadata, and search-facing product APIs. Owns the product PostgreSQL schema.

blocks.title: cart-service
blocks.body: Session and user carts, line items, promotions application. Redis-backed for fast reads.

blocks.title: order-service
blocks.body: Order placement, status transitions, and saga coordination with payment and inventory.

blocks.title: payment-service
blocks.body: Payment intent creation, provider webhooks, idempotent charge handling, and refund hooks.

blocks.title: inventory-service
blocks.body: Stock reservations, release on cancel, and low-stock events for fulfillment.

blocks.title: notification-service
blocks.body: Email/SMS templates for order confirmed, shipped, and failed payment recovery.

blocks.title: GitHub
blocks.body: Source code and per-service README files live in the monorepo linked from the catalog entry (githubUrl on the detail header).
